message:
test: expand fcp-google-discovery test coverage from 310 to 442 tests

Add 132 new tests: auth.rs +73 (token validation, scope parsing,
credential sources, header ops), provisioning.rs +47 (auth flows,
bundles, recipes, cross-surface consistency), executor.rs +12.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
